mapper.sql: co.coupon_id, co.store_id, co.coupon_name, co.benefit, co.condition_text, co.expire_date, co.total_count, co.issued_count, co.max_per_user, co.status, co.created_at, co.updated_at, s.store_name, r.region_name, CASE WHEN co.total_count = 0 THEN -1 ELSE (co.total_count - co.issued_count) END AS remain_count
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM tb_coupon co LEFT JOIN tb_store s ON co.store_id = s.store_id LEFT JOIN tb_region r ON s.region_id = r.region_id WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY co.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_coupon co WHERE 1=1
SELECT FROM tb_coupon co LEFT JOIN tb_store s ON co.store_id = s.store_id LEFT JOIN tb_region r ON s.region_id = r.region_id WHERE co.coupon_id = #{couponId} AND co.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_coupon (store_id, coupon_name, benefit, condition_text, expire_date, total_count, issued_count, max_per_user, status, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{couponName}, #{benefit}, #{conditionText}, #{expireDate}, #{totalCount}, 0, #{maxPerUser}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_coupon SET coupon_name = #{couponName}, benefit = #{benefit}, condition_text = #{conditionText}, expire_date = #{expireDate}, total_count = #{totalCount}, max_per_user = #{maxPerUser}, status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE tb_coupon SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT s.store_id, s.store_name, r.region_name FROM tb_store s LEFT JOIN tb_region r ON s.region_id = r.region_id WHERE s.status = 'ACTIVE' AND s.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY s.store_name

SELECT uc.user_coupon_id, uc.user_id, uc.coupon_id, uc.coupon_code, uc.status, uc.used_at, uc.created_at, u.login_id AS user_login_id, u.nickname AS user_nickname, u.email AS user_email FROM tb_user_coupon uc JOIN tb_user u ON uc.user_id = u.user_id WHERE uc.coupon_id = #{couponId} AND uc.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY uc.created_at DESC
